title: Joby Demonstrated its Air Taxi in Manhattan, but You Can’t Fly in It Yet
summary_full: Aviation start-ups and the Trump administration want to replace helicopters with electric aircraft, but the new vehicles still have to pass arduous tests before the public can use them.
summary_public: Aviation start-ups and the Trump administration want to replace helicopters with electric aircraft, but the new vehicles still have to pass arduous tests before the public can use them.
